_comment: Satellite configuration for N2YO and TLE producers. NORAD IDs match TRACKED_SATELLITES in .env.

satellites.name: ISS
satellites.description: International Space Station — LEO, 420 km, 51.6 deg inclination

satellites.name: HUBBLE
satellites.description: Hubble Space Telescope — LEO, 540 km, 28.5 deg inclination

satellites.name: STARLINK-24
satellites.description: SpaceX Starlink constellation — LEO, 550 km, 53 deg inclination
